underlying_goal: Make the wikidata works catalog file comprehensive and complete so MIDI files from PDMX corpus match catalog entries, enabling the app to show works with MIDI
friction_detail: The regeneration script had issues with reading composer QIDs and needed multiple edits to fix the logic.
brief_summary: User wanted to regenerate the wikidata works catalog to be comprehensive and match MIDI files; achieved 666 works with MIDI (from zero), and user was satisfied with the result.
